zh.lifeSummary: 當Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan於0934年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Earl Gwerystan ap Gwynnan Brochwell of Powys of Devonshire45歲，母親Morfydd Ferch Owain of Wales31歲。她於大約0952年與King Einion ab Owain在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於0963年在威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素享年29歲，埋葬在威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan于0934年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Earl Gwerystan ap Gwynnan Brochwell of Powys of Devonshire45岁，母亲Morfydd Ferch Owain of Wales31岁。她于大约0952年与King Einion ab Owain在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于0963年在威尔士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素享年29岁，埋葬在威尔士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Nest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

en.lifeSummary: When Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan was born in 0934, in Devon, England, her father, Earl Gwerystan ap Gwynnan Brochwell of Powys of Devonshire, was 45 and her mother, Morfydd Ferch Owain of Wales, was 31. She married King Einion ab Owain about 0952, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 0963, in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 29, and was buried in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan est née en 0934, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Earl Gwerystan ap Gwynnan Brochwell of Powys of Devonshire, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Morfydd Ferch Owain of Wales, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé King Einion ab Owain environ 0952, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 0963, à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterrée à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles.

de.Dynevor Castle,Llandilo,Carmarthenshire,: Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan 0934 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Earl Gwerystan ap Gwynnan Brochwell of Powys of Devonshire 45 und ihre Mutter Morfydd Ferch Owain of Wales 31. Sie hat um 0952 in Devon, England, United Kingdom King Einion ab Owain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 0963 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales und wurde in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan è nata il nel 0934 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Earl Gwerystan ap Gwynnan Brochwell of Powys of Devonshire, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Morfydd Ferch Owain of Wales, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato King Einion ab Owain circa 0952, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 0963, nel Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolta a Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Queen Nest ferch Gwerystanが0934年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Earl Gwerystan ap Gwynnan Brochwell of Powys of Devonshireは45歳，母Morfydd Ferch Owain of Walesは31歳であった。約0952年にイギリスイギリスデボンでKing Einion ab Owainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は0963年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルで29歳で死去し，ウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan(이)가 0934년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Earl Gwerystan ap Gwynnan Brochwell of Powys of Devonshire(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Morfydd Ferch Owain of Wales(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 0952년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 King Einion ab Owain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 0963년 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan nasceu em 0934, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Earl Gwerystan ap Gwynnan Brochwell of Powys of Devonshire, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Morfydd Ferch Owain of Wales, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com King Einion ab Owain aproximadamente 0952, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 0963, em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, com 29 anos, e foi sepultada em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales.

ro.Dynevor Castle,Llandilo,Carmarthenshire,: Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan родилась в 0934 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Earl Gwerystan ap Gwynnan Brochwell of Powys of Devonshire было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Morfydd Ferch Owain of Wales, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Einion ab Owain около 0952 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 0963 г. в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 29 лет и была похоронена в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan nació en 0934, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Earl Gwerystan ap Gwynnan Brochwell of Powys of Devonshire, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Morfydd Ferch Owain of Wales, tenía 31 años. Se casó con King Einion ab Owain aproximadamente 0952, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 0963, en Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultada en Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales.
